24: /// Normalized route entry used during flow construction.
25: struct EffectiveRoute {
26:     phase: String,
27:     module_id: String,
28:     priority: u16,
29:     path: String,
30:     headers: Option<HashMap<String, String>>,
31:     query: Option<HashMap<String, String>>,

34:     status_code: Option<String>,
35: }

37: impl Flow {
38:     pub fn new(config: &ServerConfig, config_json: String) -> Result<Self, String> {
39:         let mut manager = FlowManager::new();
40:         let api = create_host_api();
41: 
42:         let mut plugin_paths = HashMap::new();
43: 
44:         // ------------------------------------------------------------------
45:         // Collect all routes from both sources:
46:         //   1. Top-level config.routes  (UrlRoute, has module_id field)
47:         //   2. Module-embedded module.routes (UriMatcher, module_id = module id/name)
48:         // Resolve phase: route.phase → module.phase → "Content"
49:         // ------------------------------------------------------------------
50:         let mut all_routes: Vec<EffectiveRoute> = Vec::new();
51: 
52:         // Build a quick lookup: module_id → module phase
53:         let module_phase_map: HashMap<String, Option<String>> = config.modules.iter().map(|m| {
54:             let id = m.id.clone().unwrap_or_else(|| m.name.clone());
55:             (id, m.phase.clone())
56:         }).collect();
57: 
58:         // 1. Top-level routes
59:         for r in &config.routes {
60:             let module_id = r.module_id.clone().unwrap_or_default();
61:             if module_id.is_empty() { continue; }
62: 
63:             let route_phase = r.phase.as_deref();
64:             let module_phase = module_phase_map.get(&module_id).and_then(|p| p.as_deref());
65:             let phase = route_phase.or(module_phase).unwrap_or("Content").to_string();
66: 
67:             all_routes.push(EffectiveRoute {
68:                 phase,
69:                 module_id,
70:                 priority: r.priority,
71:                 path: r.url.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
72:                 headers: r.headers.clone(),
73:                 query: r.query.clone(),
74:                 protocol: r.protocol.clone(),
75:                 hostname: r.hostname.clone(),
76:                 status_code: r.status_code.clone(),
77:             });
78:         }
79: 
80:         // 2. Module-embedded routes (UriMatcher format)
81:         for mod_cfg in &config.modules {
82:             if let Some(mod_routes) = &mod_cfg.routes {
83:                 let module_id = mod_cfg.id.as_deref().unwrap_or(&mod_cfg.name).to_string();
84:                 let module_phase = mod_cfg.phase.as_deref();
85: 
86:                 for r in mod_routes {
87:                     let route_phase = r.phase.as_deref();
88:                     let phase = route_phase.or(module_phase).unwrap_or("Content").to_string();
89: 
90:                     all_routes.push(EffectiveRoute {
91:                         phase,
92:                         module_id: module_id.clone(),
93:                         priority: r.priority,
94:                         path: r.path.clone(),
95:                         headers: r.headers.clone(),
96:                         query: r.query.clone(),
97:                         protocol: r.protocol.clone(),
98:                         hostname: r.hostname.clone(),
99:                         status_code: r.status_code.clone(),
100:                     });
101:                 }
102:             }
103:         }
104: 
105:         // ------------------------------------------------------------------
106:         // Group routes by phase and sort each group by priority (ascending).
107:         // Lower priority number = higher precedence = checked first by router.
108:         // ------------------------------------------------------------------
109:         let mut routes_by_phase: HashMap<String, Vec<&EffectiveRoute>> = HashMap::new();
110:         for r in &all_routes {
111:             routes_by_phase.entry(r.phase.clone()).or_default().push(r);
112:         }
113:         for routes in routes_by_phase.values_mut() {
114:             routes.sort_by_key(|r| r.priority);
115:         }

122:         // Build pipeline stages (from workflow config).
123:         // For each stage, inject a per-phase router config and embed the
